subject: Re: Let's connect — ITAD / E-Waste Pickup
body:
Hi Test,

Great to hear from you! I'd love to set up a quick 20-minute call to learn more about Test Company's IT asset needs and see how we can help.

Feel free to grab a time that works for you:
👉 https://calendly.com/zs-recycling/30min

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
J. Aaron
ZS Recycling
J.aaron@zsrecycling.com
